PropertyValue: ShipmentId=shipment_id
(Select TOP 1 x.LogoPath from AIT_SS_CarrierLogos x where x.carrier_code = CarrierCode)
(select COALESCE(sc.carrier_service_type, asvm.servicetype, '') from shipcode_mst sc left join AITShipViaMap_mst asvm on sc.ship_code = asvm.ShipCode where sc.ship_code = ShipCode)

(SELECT top 1 co.curr_code FROM AIT_SS_BOL ship left join AIT_SS_BOL_line sl  on ship.shipment_id = sl.shipment_id  left join AIT_SS_pick_list_ref plr on plr.pick_list_id = sl.pick_list_id and plr.[sequence] = sl.pick_list_ref_sequence  inner join co co on co.co_num = ISNULL(plr.ref_num, sl.ref_num)  WHERE ship.shipment_id = ShipmentId)
(select TOP 1 z.ServiceType FROM AITShip_CarrierServiceType z Where z.DefaultServiceOption = 1 AND z.Carrier = cst.Carrier)
ISNULL(DerPPAmount,0) + ISNULL(DerCOLAmount,0)

ISNULL((SELECT TOP 1 1 FROM ue_SS_CHRB_ShipHdrReturn r inner join AIT_SS_BOL_Package p on p.shipment_id = ShipmentId AND r.trackingnumber  = p.trackingnumber AND ISNULL(p.alt_TrackingNumber,'') = ''),0)
ISNULL(COLMiscCharges,0) + ISNULL(COLFreightCharges,0) + ISNULL(COLFee,0)

dbo.AIT_SS_GetCustCarrierAcctFn(shi.shipment_id,'D')

CASE WHEN EXISTS(select 1 from AIT_SS_BOL_package pkg where pkg.shipment_id = ShipmentId)  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

CASE WHEN (ISNULL(m.EPost_Flag,0) = 0 AND (m.rowpointer IS NULL OR cst.CarrierServiceCode IS NULL)) OR (ISNULL(m.EPost_Flag,0) = 1 AND (EPost_Carrier IS NULL OR EPost_ServiceType IS NULL)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
(Select TOP 1 x.LabelPdf FROM AIT_ESTES_BOLHdrReturn x where CAST(x.bolNumber AS NVARCHAR(10)) = CAST(shi.shipment_id AS NVARCHAR(10)) Order by x.bol_key DESC)
dbo.AIT_SS_HtsValueNeedsITNFn(ShipmentId)
(SELECT dbo.AIT_SS_GetListOfBOLDataFn(shi.shipment_id,'ORDER',''))

(SELECT DISTINCT co.payment_method FROM AIT_SS_BOL shipment INNER JOIN AIT_SS_BOL_line shipline ON shipment.shipment_id = shipline.shipment_id LEFT   JOIN AIT_SS_pick_list_ref pick_list_ref ON pick_list_ref.pick_list_id = shipline.pick_list_id INNER JOIN AIT_SS_Ref co ON co.co_num = ISNULL(pick_list_ref.ref_num, shipline.ref_num) AND co.ss_reftype = pick_list_ref.ref_type WHERE shipment.shipment_id = ShipmentId)
(SELECT dbo.AIT_SS_GetListOfBOLDataFn(shi.shipment_id,'PICKLIST',''))
ISNULL(PPDFee,0) + ISNULL(PPDMiscCharges,0) + ISNULL(PPDFreightCharges,0)
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM AIT_SS_BOL_Package p where p.shipment_id = ShipmentId)
dbo.MsgAppSubSp('&1', '@:ShipmentStatus' + ISNULL(shi.status, {''}), '&1')
(SELECT SUM(shipseq.qty_picked) FROM AIT_SS_BOL_seq shipseq WHERE shipseq.shipment_id = ShipmentId)
(SELECT SUM(shipseq.qty_shipped) FROM AIT_SS_BOL_seq shipseq WHERE shipseq.shipment_id = ShipmentId)
